{{More footnotes needed|date=April 2026}}
{{infobox football tournament season
|title           = Copa do Brasil
|year            = 1998
|other_titles    = Copa do Brasil 1998
|image           =
|image_size       = 250px
|caption         = 
|country         = Brazil
|dates           = January 20 - May 30
|num_teams       = 42
|winners       = [[Sociedade Esportiva Palmeiras|Palmeiras (SP)]]
|second       = [[Cruzeiro Esporte Clube|Cruzeiro (MG)]]
|matches         = 75
|goals           = 233
|scoring_leader = [[Romário]] (7)
|award          = 
|prev_season      = [[1997 Copa do Brasil|1997]]
|next_season      = [[1999 Copa do Brasil|1999]]
}}

The '''Copa do Brasil 1998''' was the 10th staging of the [[Copa do Brasil]].

The competition started on January 20, 1998, and concluded on May 30, 1998, with the second leg of the final, held at the [[Estádio do Morumbi]] in [[São Paulo]], in which [[Sociedade Esportiva Palmeiras|Palmeiras]] lifted the trophy for the first time with a 2–0 victory over [[Cruzeiro Esporte Clube|Cruzeiro]].

[[Romário]], of [[Clube de Regatas do Flamengo|Flamengo]], with 7 goals, was the competition's topscorer.

==Format==
The preliminary round was disputed by 20 clubs, while the first stage was disputed by 32 clubs, including the ones qualified from the preliminary stage. The competition was disputed in a [[Single-elimination tournament|knock-out]] format. In the preliminary stage and in the first round if the away team won the first leg with an advantage of at least two goals, the second leg was not played and the club automatically qualified to the next round. The following rounds were played over two legs and the [[away goals rule]] was used.

==Competition stages==

===Preliminary round===
{{TwoLegStart}}
{{TwoLegResult|[[ABC Futebol Clube|ABC (RN)]]||1-4|'''[[Fluminense Football Club|Fluminense (RJ)]]'''||1-4|-}}
{{TwoLegResult|[[Ji-Paraná Futebol Clube|Ji-Paraná (RO)]]||2-5|'''[[América Futebol Clube (MG)|América (MG)]]'''||2-3|0-2}}
{{TwoLegResult|[[Villa Nova Atlético Clube|Villa Nova (MG)]]||5-6|'''[[Santos Futebol Clube|Santos (SP)]]'''||3-4|2-2}}
{{TwoLegResult|[[Operário Futebol Clube (MS)|Operário (MS)]]||0-4|'''[[Clube de Regatas do Flamengo|Flamengo (RJ)]]'''||0-0|0-4}}
{{TwoLegResult|[[Clube do Remo|Remo (PA)]]||2-5|'''[[Associação Portuguesa de Desportos|Portuguesa (SP)]]'''||2-0|0-5}}
{{TwoLegResult|'''[[Amapá Clube|Amapá (AP)]]'''||3-3|[[Baré Esporte Clube|Baré (RR)]]||1-1|2-2}}
{{TwoLegResult|[[Centro Sportivo Alagoano|CSA (AL)]]||0-4|'''[[Sociedade Esportiva Palmeiras|Palmeiras (SP)]]'''||0-1|0-3}}
{{TwoLegResult|'''[[Vila Nova Futebol Clube|Vila Nova (GO)]]'''||2-1|[[Coritiba Foot Ball Club|Coritiba (PR)]]||2-1|0-0}}
{{TwoLegResult|'''[[Linhares Esporte Clube|Linhares (ES)]]'''||1-1|[[América Futebol Clube (RN)|América (RN)]]||0-0|1-1}}
{{TwoLegResult|[[Avaí Futebol Clube|Avaí (SC)]]||2-6|'''[[Clube Atlético Mineiro|Atlético (MG)]]'''||1-1|1-5}}
|}

===Knockout stages===
{{32TeamBracket

| RD1-team01=[[Associação Atlética Alvorada|Alvorada (TO)]]
| RD1-score01=1 0
| RD1-team02='''[[Clube Atlético Mineiro|Atlético (MG)]]'''
| RD1-score02=2 7

| RD1-team03=[[Fluminense Football Club|Fluminense (RJ)]]
| RD1-score03=0
| RD1-team04='''[[Paraná Clube|Paraná (PR)]]'''
| RD1-score04=2

| RD1-team05=[[Goiás Esporte Clube|Goiás (GO)]]
| RD1-score05=2
| RD1-team06='''[[Santos Futebol Clube|Santos (SP)]]'''
| RD1-score06=5

| RD1-team07=[[Botafogo Futebol Clube (PB)|Botafogo (PB)]]
| RD1-score07=2 2
| RD1-team08='''[[Esporte Clube Bahia|Bahia (BA)]]'''
| RD1-score08=3 1

| RD1-team09=[[São Raimundo Esporte Clube (AM)|São Raimundo (AM)]]
| RD1-score09=0 0
| RD1-team10='''[[Botafogo de Futebol e Regatas|Botafogo (RJ)]]'''
| RD1-score10=1 4

| RD1-team11=[[Ceará Sporting Club|Ceará (CE)]]
| RD1-score11=1 0
| RD1-team12='''[[Sociedade Esportiva Palmeiras|Palmeiras (SP)]]'''
| RD1-score12=1 6

| RD1-team13=[[Associação Portuguesa de Desportos|Portuguesa (SP)]]
| RD1-score13=2 2
| RD1-team14='''[[Sport Club do Recife|Sport (PE)]]'''
| RD1-score14=1 4

| RD1-team15='''[[América Futebol Clube (MG)|América (MG)]]'''
| RD1-score15=1 0 (pen: 4)
| RD1-team16=[[Sport Club Internacional|Internacional (RS)]]
| RD1-score16=0 1 (pen: 2)

| RD1-team17=[[Sociedade Esportiva do Gama|Gama (DF)]]
| RD1-score17=2
| RD1-team18='''[[Clube de Regatas do Flamengo|Flamengo (RJ)]]'''
| RD1-score18=4

| RD1-team19=[[Esporte Clube Operário|Operário (MT)]]
| RD1-score19=2 1
| RD1-team20='''[[Esporte Clube Vitória|Vitória (BA)]]'''
| RD1-score20=2 3

| RD1-team21=[[Amapá Clube|Amapá (AP)]]
| RD1-score21=1
| RD1-team22='''[[Cruzeiro Esporte Clube|Cruzeiro (MG)]]'''
| RD1-score22=7

| RD1-team23=[[Associação Olímpica de Itabaiana|Itabaiana (SE)]]
| RD1-score23=0
| RD1-team24='''[[Sport Club Corinthians Paulista|Corinthians (SP)]]'''
| RD1-score24=3

| RD1-team25=[[Rio Branco Football Club|Rio Branco (AC)]]
| RD1-score25=0
| RD1-team26='''[[Vila Nova Futebol Clube|Vila Nova (GO)]]'''
| RD1-score26=2

| RD1-team27=[[Sociedade Esportiva Picos|Picos (PI)]]
| RD1-score27=1 0
| RD1-team28='''[[Club de Regatas Vasco da Gama|Vasco (RJ)]]'''
| RD1-score28=1 8

| RD1-team29=[[Sampaio Corrêa Futebol Clube|Sampaio Corrêa (MA)]]
| RD1-score29=0 0
| RD1-team30='''[[São Paulo Futebol Clube|São Paulo (SP)]]'''
| RD1-score30=0 4

| RD1-team31=[[Linhares Esporte Clube|Linhares (ES)]]
| RD1-score31=0 0 
| RD1-team32='''[[Grêmio Foot-Ball Porto Alegrense|Grêmio (RS)]]'''
| RD1-score32=0 2

| RD2-team01=Atlético (MG)
| RD2-score01=1 0
| RD2-team02='''Paraná (PR)'''
| RD2-score02=1 1

| RD2-team03='''Santos (SP)'''
| RD2-score03=3 5
| RD2-team04=Bahia (BA)
| RD2-score04=3 2

| RD2-team05=Botafogo (RJ)
| RD2-score05=2 0
| RD2-team06='''Palmeiras (SP)'''
| RD2-score06=1 1

| RD2-team07='''Sport (PE)'''
| RD2-score07=3 2
| RD2-team08=América (MG)
| RD2-score08=3 1

| RD2-team09=Flamengo (RJ)
| RD2-score09=2 0
| RD2-team10='''Vitória (BA)'''
| RD2-score10=5 5

| RD2-team11='''Cruzeiro (MG)'''
| RD2-score11=3 1
| RD2-team12=Corinthians (SP)
| RD2-score12=1 1

| RD2-team13=Vila Nova (GO)
| RD2-score13=0 0
| RD2-team14='''Vasco (RJ)'''
| RD2-score14=0 2

| RD2-team15='''São Paulo (SP)'''
| RD2-score15=2 2
| RD2-team16=Grêmio (RS)
| RD2-score16=0 0

| RD3-team01=Paraná (PR)
| RD3-score01=0 0
| RD3-team02='''Santos (SP)'''
| RD3-score02=1 1

| RD3-team03='''Palmeiras (SP)'''
| RD3-score03=2 1
| RD3-team04=Sport (PE)
| RD3-score04=0 1

| RD3-team05=Vitória (BA)
| RD3-score05=0 1
| RD3-team06='''Cruzeiro (MG)'''
| RD3-score06=2 0

| RD3-team07='''Vasco (RJ)'''
| RD3-score07=1 4
| RD3-team08=São Paulo (SP)
| RD3-score08=1 3

| RD4-team01=Santos (SP)
| RD4-score01=1 2
| RD4-team02='''Palmeiras (SP)'''
| RD4-score02=1 2

| RD4-team03='''Cruzeiro (MG)'''
| RD4-score03=2 0
| RD4-team04=Vasco (RJ)
| RD4-score04=0 0

| RD5-team01='''Palmeiras (SP)'''
| RD5-score01=0 2
| RD5-team02=Cruzeiro (MG)
| RD5-score02=1 0
}}

{| class="wikitable" style="text-align: center; margin: 0 auto;"
|-
!Copa do Brasil<br />1998 Winners
|-
|[[Image:Bandeira do Estado de São Paulo.svg|100px|São Paulo]]<br>'''[[Sociedade Esportiva Palmeiras|Palmeiras]]'''<br/>'''First Title'''
|}

==References==
* [https://web.archive.org/web/20070902145925/http://paginas.terra.com.br/esporte/rsssfbrasil/tables/cbr1998.htm Copa do Brasil 1998 at RSSSF]
*{{in lang|pt}} [http://www.campeoesdofutebol.com.br/art_copabrasil.html Copa do Brasil top scorers at Campeões do Futebol]
*''Enciclopédia do Futebol Brasileiro'', Volume 2 - Lance, Rio de Janeiro: Aretê Editorial S/A, 2001.

{{Copa do Brasil Seasons}}

{{DEFAULTSORT:Copa Do Brasil 1998}}
[[Category:Copa do Brasil seasons|1998]]
[[Category:1998 in Brazilian football]]
[[Category:1998 in domestic association football cups]]
